title: Week 1: B‑roll and moments from the road (Arkansas)
reflection: After spending a few days in Pine Bluff, one thing is clear: having internet access and having meaningful STEM engagement are two very different things. Students here can technically access online courses, but without mentors, role models, or a culture that sees STEM as a viable path, the access can feel hollow.

title: Sandhills and side roads (Nebraska)
reflection: Broken Bow is quiet in the best way—time to think between interviews. I’m using this vlog to capture the B‑roll: fields, the drive, small-town cafés, and the spaces between the formal sit-downs.
